Of Alnwick and Newcastle Northumberland Horsley

zh.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley是Of England Horsley的兒子，於1143年出生。他至少有19個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley是Of England Horsley的儿子，于1143年出生。他至少有19个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Horsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northeastern England): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hors ‘horse’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, such as Horsley (Derbyshire, Gloucestershire), Long Horsley (Northumberland), and Horseley Hills Farm in Wolverley (Worcestershire), probably referring to a place where horses were put out to pasture.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley was born in 1143 as the son of Of England Horsley. He had at least 19 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley est né en 1143, fils de Of England Horsley. Il a eu au moins 19 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley wurde 1143, als Sohn von Of England Horsley geboren. Er hatte mindestens 19 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley è nato il nel 1143 come figlio di Of England Horsley. Lui avuto almeno 19 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsleyは1143年にOf England Horsleyの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも19人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley(은)는 1143년 Of England Horsley의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley nasceu em 1143 filho de Of England Horsley. Ele teve pelo menos 19 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley родился в 1143 г. Его отца звали Of England Horsley. У него было по крайней мере 19 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Of Northumberland Horsley nació en 1143 como hijo de Of England Horsley. Tuvo por lo menos 19 hijos y 1 hija.
